findings.title: No CLI State API exists to persist plan patches (e.g., add phases / update plan metadata) independent of progress updates
findings.snippet: // Learn workflow state commands (internal API for agents)
findings.impact: Docs like learn:execute cannot safely persist plan upgrades; workarounds require direct file edits (breaking the intended boundary).
findings.recommendation: Add ccw learn:write-plan or ccw learn:update-plan (validated + lock-protected), and update docs to use it.

findings.title: learn:update-progress writes plan.json then progress.json; partial failure can leave plan/progress inconsistent
findings.snippet: atomicWriteJson(planPath, plan, getPlanValidator()); ... atomicWriteJson(progressPath, progress, () => true);
findings.impact: If the second write fails (disk/full/permissions), plan status changes may persist without corresponding progress evidence.
findings.recommendation: Write both to temp + promote together (or record a journal entry) to preserve cross-file atomicity.

leads.description: Search for any existing plan/session write helper commands
